name: Bolivar Recreation and Aquatic Center
description: Bolivar Recreation and Aquatic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bolivar, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Cribbs Family Youth Park
description: Cribbs Family Youth Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bolivar, MO. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
